tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"for p in /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/scp /usr/bin/rsync /bin/cp /bin/mv /usr/bin/zip /usr/bin/tar; do if [ -e \"$p\" ]; then chmod a-x \"$p\"; fi; done; ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/scp /usr/bin/rsync /bin/cp /bin/mv /usr/bin/zip /usr/bin/tar 2>/dev/null"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
for p in /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/sscp /usr/bin/rsync /bin/cp /bin/mv /usr/bin/zip /usr/bin/tar; do if [ -e "$p" ];  then chmod a-x "$p"; fi; done; ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/scp /uusr/bin/rsync /bin/cp /bin/mv /usr/bin/zip /usr/bin/tar 2>/dev/null
